and ameliorative powers. In esoteric science too herbs, spells and
gems play an important role in this regard. This is due to the fact
that objects receive, in addition to having their innate powers,
cosmic energy from every other object in the world, especially from
the mighty heavenly bodies. If we understand this principle, we
can easily appreciate the Moon's appellation, Osadhl^a, lord of
herbs. The herbs, gems, seeds and minerals used for the Pusya-
snana along with the powerful Mantras are meant to give a good
deal of spiritual strength to the king. Look at the wonderfully signi-
ficant names of the herbs : Trayamana meaning protective, Abha-
ya freedom from fear, Aparajita never defeated etc.]
